Question: Given that $$h^{- 1} ( 6 ) = 2 ,$$ what are the corresponding input and output values of the original function $$h ?$$
The domain of function $$f$$ is $$( 1 , \infty )$$ and the range of function $$f$$ is $$( -∞ , -2 ) .$$ Find the domain and range of the inverse function.
Answer: The domain of function $$f^{- 1}$$ is $$( - \infty \text{,} - 2 )$$ and the range of function $$f^{- 1}$$ is $$( 1 , \infty ) .$$

Question:
Using Table 4 , find and interpret ⓐ $$\text{} f ( 60 ) ,$$ and ⓑ $$\text{} f^{- 1} ( 60 ) .$$ \begin{table}[h]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
$$t \text{(minutes)}$$ & 30 & 50 & 60 & 70 & 90 \\ \hline
$$f ( t ) \text{(miles)}$$ & 20 & 40 & 50 & 60 & 70 \\ \hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table} Table 4
Answer: ⓐ $$f ( 60 ) = 50.$$ In 60 minutes, 50 miles are traveled. ⓑ $$f^{- 1} ( 60 ) = 70.$$ To travel 60 miles, it will take 70 minutes.
